docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TAPIA, ESTHER AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, LETICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
